hero.subtitle: Tell us where you want to go, when, and your budget — our AI instantly compares hundreds of airlines and hotels to find you the best deal. In seconds.
hero.placeholder: e.g. Family trip to Istanbul next month, budget $1,500

suggestions.title: Try now:
items: Cheapest flight from Jeddah this week

brandStory.title: Why GoTripza Exists
brandStory.body: We were tired of opening 10 tabs just to find a decent flight price. GoTripza was built so you can describe your trip in plain language — and we do the rest. No tab-switching. No hidden fees. No wasted time.

mockups.title: Search to booking in 3 steps
mockups.subtitle: Ask, choose, and enjoy your trip.

search.prompt: Where do you want to go?

confirm.title: ✅ Booking Confirmed!
confirm.wish: Have an amazing trip — GoTripza is always here for you!

ai.title: Search in plain English
ai.desc: No forms, no dropdowns — just type what you want and we get it

smart.title: Prices in your currency
smart.desc: No currency surprises — the price you see is the price you pay

fast.title: 100s of airlines compared
fast.desc: We scan hundreds of flights and hotels simultaneously for the best deal

support.title: Zero service fees
support.desc: GoTripza is completely free — we only earn when you book via our partners

secure.title: All payment methods
secure.desc: Apple Pay, PayPal, Visa, Mastercard — all major methods accepted

empathy.title: Traveler first
empathy.desc: Every decision we make starts with what's best for you

simplicity.title: Radical simplicity
simplicity.desc: One site, one search, one decision — done

inspiration.title: Discover the unexpected
inspiration.desc: Destinations you haven't considered, at prices that surprise you

trust.title: Full transparency
trust.desc: No hidden fees, no bait-and-switch — what you see is what you pay

speed.title: Seconds, not hours
speed.desc: What used to take hours of research, GoTripza does in seconds

destinations.title: Every Journey Has a Story
destinations.subtitle: Discover your destination, book your ticket, live the moment.

results.loading: 🔍 Scanning the best prices for you...

footer.tagline: One search. Hundreds of options. Best price.
footer.affiliate: GoTripza earns a commission when you book through our trusted partners — at absolutely no extra cost to you.

errors.parse: We couldn't understand that — try adding your destination, dates, and number of travelers.
errors.network: Connection lost — check your internet and try again.
